# CWE-639: Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-639-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"strconv"
)

type Invoice struct {
	ID     int     `json:"id"`
	UserID int     `json:"user_id"`
	Amount float64 `json:"amount"`
}

// Safe: user-controlled key is scoped to the authenticated owner.
func GetInvoice(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	invoiceID := r.URL.Query().Get("invoice_id")
	ownerID, _ := strconv.Atoi(r.Header.Get("X-User-ID"))
	var inv Invoice
	err := db.QueryRow("SELECT id, user_id, amount FROM invoices WHERE id = $1 AND user_id = $2", invoiceID, ownerID).Scan(&inv.ID, &inv.UserID, &inv.Amount)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "not found", http.StatusNotFound)
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(inv)
}
